exploration_notes: Traced the 'verify_gimple failed' ICE through GCC: (1) `gcc/tree-cfg.cc` implements `verify_gimple_in_seq` (line 5244) which calls `verify_gimple_in_seq_2` and on failure calls `internal_error("%<verify_gimple%> failed")` at line 5249. (2) `verify_gimple_stmt` is also in `gcc/tree-cfg.cc` (line 5034) — it dispatches to per-statement-type verifiers via a switch on `gimple_code(stmt)`.
